uploadCard.title: Upload image / PDF
uploadCard.desc: Drag & drop or choose a file

dropzone.title: Drag & drop or click to choose a file
dropzone.hint: Supports JPG, JPEG, PNG, WEBP, PDF — up to 10 MB
dropzone.aria: Drag a file here or click to choose a file

errors.fileTooLarge: File is too large. The maximum size is 10 MB.
errors.unsupportedType: Unsupported format. Only JPG, PNG, WEBP, PDF are accepted.
errors.rateLimited: You're going too fast. Please wait a few seconds and try again.

errorFallback.title: Something went wrong
errorFallback.body: The system hit an unexpected problem. Please reload the page; if the error persists, go back home and try again later.

routeError.title: This page hit an error
routeError.body: The content couldn't load due to an unexpected error. Reload the page to try again, or go back to the Dashboard to continue.

verify.errorBody: The verification link is invalid, has expired, or has already been used. Please request a new login link.
verify.successBody: Your account is now fully set up. You can start exploring menus.
verify.confirmBody: Press the button below to finish signing in to MenuScan.

checkEmail.bodyWithEmail: We've sent a verification link to {{email}}. Please click the link to activate your account.
checkEmail.bodyWithEmailPrefix: We've sent a verification link to
checkEmail.bodyWithEmailSuffix: Please click the link to activate your account.
checkEmail.bodyNoEmail: We've sent a verification link to your email. Please click the link to activate your account.

magicLink.emailUnavailable: The email service is temporarily unavailable.
magicLink.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

authVerify.tokenMissing: The verification token was not found in the URL. Please check the link in your email.
authVerify.linkInvalid: The verification link has expired or is invalid.

setPassword.subtitle: Set a password to log in directly next time.

errors.minLength: The password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.mismatch: The confirmation password does not match.
errors.saveFailed: Something went wrong while saving the password. Please try again.

upload.title: Upload image / PDF
upload.desc: Drag & drop or choose a file from your device

empty.title: No scan sessions yet
empty.body: Upload your first menu so MenuScan can extract the dish list.

menus.title: Menus
menus.empty: No menus yet. After scanning, confirm the final review so the menu appears here.

bills.title: Bills
bills.subtitle: Review the receipts you have created.
bills.empty: No bills yet. Pick dishes on a menu, then hit Review / Confirm to create one.

camera.title: Scan with camera
camera.hint: Place the menu in the frame, make sure it's well lit and not blurry.

quality.ok: Looks good — sharp and well lit.
quality.warnTitle: This photo may not be usable:
quality.blurry: The photo is blurry — hold steady and refocus.
quality.dark: The photo is too dark — add more light.
quality.bright: The photo is too bright or glared — avoid harsh light.

errors.denied: Camera access was denied. Please allow camera access in your browser.
errors.notFound: No camera was found on the device.
errors.openFailed: Couldn't open the camera. Please try again.
errors.uploadFailed: Couldn't upload the photo. Please try again.

menuDetail.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leaving will discard these edits?
menuDetail.enrichFailed: Couldn't analyse the dishes. The menu still works — reload to retry, or just ask the assistant.
menuDetail.noItems: No dishes in this menu yet.
menuDetail.selectPrompt: Select dishes to see the subtotal.

split.title: Split the bill
split.assignTitle: Dishes you added — who splits them?
split.assignHint: Tap to pick who splits the dish (split evenly among those picked)

dining.title: Dining Session
dining.createSubtitle: Create a session for everyone to scan the QR code and submit their dining preferences.
dining.joinSubtitle: Input your dining preferences so the Host knows what dishes fit best.
dining.scanQrDesc: Scan this code to quickly input your food preferences without an account.
dining.noParticipants: No one has joined yet. Share the QR code above to start!
dining.joinSuccessDesc: Your dining preferences have been sent to the Host. You can close this tab now.
dining.sessionExpired: Dining session has expired or is closed.

onboarding.title: Create your food profile
onboarding.subtitle: Set a starting profile for dish recommendations. You can skip this and add it later in your account.

chat.title: Ask the dish assistant
chat.hint: Ask about the dishes on this menu.
chat.pickDish: Pick a dish to ask about
chat.rateLimited: You're asking a bit fast. Please wait a few seconds and try again.
chat.error: The assistant is busy. Please try again in a moment.
chat.disclaimer: Answers are based on your scanned menu, for reference only — not an allergy safety guarantee.

errors.nameRequired: The original name can't be empty.
errors.priceInvalid: The price must be a non-negative number.

errors.nameTooLong: The display name can be at most 150 characters.
errors.updateFailed: Couldn't update the profile. Please try again.
errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load the full account information.

foodProfile.title: Food profiles
foodProfile.subtitle: Saved food preferences used by the AI assistant before scanning a menu.
foodProfile.empty: No food profile yet. Add one now or create it later before scanning.
foodProfile.name: Profile name

errors.saveFailed: Couldn't save the food profile. Please try again.
errors.deleteFailed: Couldn't delete the food profile. Please try again.

noItems.title: No dishes could be extracted
noItems.body: The image may be unclear, not a menu, or the OCR provider isn't configured. Try again with a clearer menu.

errors.resultLoadFailed: Scan finished but the result couldn't be loaded.
errors.tookTooLong: The scan is taking longer than expected. Please come back later.
errors.saveFailed: Couldn't update the menu saved state.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you opened does not exist in MenuScan.

auth.googleUnavailable: Google sign-in is not available in the MVP yet.
auth.forgotPasswordHint: To recover your account, choose "Sign up / passwordless login" to receive a quick magic link.
auth.inboxTextBefore: We've sent a verification link to
auth.inboxTextAfter: Click the link in the email to activate your account.
auth.fillEmailPassword: Please enter both email and password.
auth.fillEmail: Please enter your email to continue.
auth.sendFailed: Couldn't send the email. Please try again later.

hero.title: Snap a menu. Get clean data. In seconds.
hero.subtitle: Upload or photograph any menu and MenuScan extracts dish names, prices, descriptions and dietary tags — automatically. No typing. No mistakes. Just data ready to use.
solves: Dishes, prices and categories straight from the photo
Allergy & diet flags — vegetarian, halal, gluten-free
Accented Vietnamese and multilingual menus handled
hero.dragHint: From phở to bánh mì — we scan it all 🍜

how.title: four steps. zero typing.
how.subtitle: From menu photo to ready-to-use data in seconds.

steps.title: Upload
steps.body: Drop a menu photo or PDF — drag, drop or pick a file.

steps.title: AI reads it
steps.body: The engine reads layout, language and price tables automatically.

steps.title: Structured data
steps.body: Get dishes, prices, categories and descriptions as clean data.

steps.title: Edit & export
steps.body: Tweak, export or integrate right away — no re-typing.

partners.title: Trusted by
partners.subtitle: Hundreds of restaurants, cafés and F&B platforms rely on MenuScan.

reviews.title: Loved by restaurants everywhere
reviews.subtitle: Real stories from kitchens and cafés across the country.

items.quote: Staff used to type menus for 2-3 hours every seasonal change. With MenuScan it's done in 5 minutes with almost no fixes.
items.name: Minh Anh

items.quote: The OCR handles accented Vietnamese menus remarkably well, including prices and dish emojis. Integrated the API into our app in one afternoon.
items.name: Hoang Nguyen

items.quote: The allergy flags make it much easier for diet-conscious guests to choose — they love it.
items.name: Tran Vy

items.quote: Easy to use — even older staff can scan on their own. Managing menus is so much easier now.
items.name: Le Gia Huy

cta.title: Ready to digitize your menu?
cta.subtitle: Join MenuScan today — start free, upgrade anytime.

deleteAccount.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your personal data, food profiles, and active sessions will be permanently disabled.
deleteAccount.deletedDesc: Your account has been successfully deleted.
deleteAccount.seeYouNextMeal: See you at your next meal! 🍽️

errors.emailMismatch: Email doesn't match. Please type it exactly.
errors.requestFailed: Couldn't send the confirmation email. Please try again later.
errors.confirmFailed: Couldn't delete account. The link might have expired.
errors.missingToken: Invalid link. Please check your email again.
errors.title: Confirmation Error
